name: Corn Dogs
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat oil or shortening for frying.
2. In a medium bowl, mix together flour, cornmeal, sugar, baking powder, and salt.
3. Using a pastry blender or fork, cut in 2 tablespoons of shortening until the mixture resembles fine crumbs.
4. In a small bowl, combine egg and milk. Add to the dry mixture; mix well.
5. Pat frankfurters dry with paper towels. Dip franks into batter using tongs, being careful to coat all sides. Let excess batter drip off.
6. Drop 1 or 2 frankfurters at a time into hot oil. Fry until golden brown, about 1 minute on each side.
7. Insert wooden skewer in the end of each corn dog.
8. Serve hot, with mustard if desired.
